================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 46 B0 04 10 FE
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : -110
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 10 19 16 20 16 20
v_in[0..5]: 277 276 262 289 331 305

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16035
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 222 223 224

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 18037 17930 18091 17768 17930 18091
power[0..5]: 2 5 4 5 5 6

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1
dac_val[0..5]: 665 667 673 665 671 669

[Boot/Time]
bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 142
resetcause: 0xF3DC

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 7
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
wdt_gnd_left: 5
